records.ety: [F. alambic (cf. Sp. alambique), Ar. al-anbīq, fr. Gr. 'a`mbix cup, cap of a still. The cap or head was the alembic proper. Cf. Limbec.]

defs: An apparatus formerly used in distillation, usually made of glass or metal. It has mostly given place to the retort and worm still.
quotes: The alembic of a great poet's imagination.
notes: Used also metaphorically. The alembic of a great poet's imagination. Brimley.
